author: Nan Liu
name: 10L Mixed Precision
blurb: 10-layer 512-dim model with lower LR (MATRIX_LR=0.02) and mixed int8/int6 compression: full int8 for first/last 3 layers, int6 (step=4 rounding) for middle layers 3-6. Fits 16MB via better compression while gaining an extra transformer layer over baseline.
